summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shopply v2.1 Referral Program system. Backend APIs 100% functional (22/22 tests passed), frontend mostly working with excellent UI/UX design. Referral code generation, point assignment (50 for inviter, 25 for invitee), email invites, and point redemption all working correctly. One clipboard permission issue affecting copy functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard permission denied error when copying referral code - 'Failed to execute writeText on Clipboard: Write permission denied'
ui_bugs.impact: Error overlay appears but copy functionality may work in some browsers. Core feature affected.

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: All 22 referral API endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ User registration with referral code - points assigned correctly
✅ Points assignment: 50 points for inviter, 25 points for invitee
✅ Referral stats API - all fields present (referral_code, punti_totali, inviti_completati, bonus_disponibile)
✅ Email invite system - API working, invite records created
✅ Point redemption system - 10 points redeemed successfully
✅ Referral page UI - beautiful design with gradient cards
✅ Email invite form with proper validation
✅ Authentication system integration with test credentials

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, clipboard permission issue)

medium_priority: Fix clipboard copy functionality: Implement fallback mechanism for clipboard permissions or handle the 'write permission denied' error gracefully. Consider using a different approach for copy-to-clipboard that works across all browsers.
low_priority: Consider adding visual feedback when copy operation fails
Test referral code pre-filling on registration page more thoroughly
